intent_precise: Pooling Deep Well Plates by Column: Using pooled_plate (deep_well_plate, slot 11). (1) Transfer 100µL from source to destination.
intent: Take the deep well plate from slot 11 and use it as your pooled plate for this column pooling procedure. You'll need to transfer exactly 100µL from each source well to the corresponding destination wells in the pooled plate. Make sure to work systematically by column to maintain organization throughout the pooling process.

output_schema.protocol_name: Pooling Deep Well Plates by Column
output_schema.author: Rami Farawi <rami.farawi@opentrons.com>
